mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM listings WHERE url = #{url})
SELECT * FROM listings WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO listings ( external_id, source, title, description, price, rooms, area_sqm, address, latitude, longitude, url, net_rent, operating_costs, vat, deposit, available_from, provision, build_year, heating_demand, fgee, benefits, image_urls, thumbnail_url, has_360_view, matterport_url, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{externalId}, #{source}, #{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{rooms}, #{area}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{url}, #{netRent}, #{operatingCosts}, #{vat}, #{deposit}, #{availableFrom}, #{provision}, #{buildYear}, #{heatingDemand}, #{fgee}, #{benefits}, #{imageUrls}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{has360View}, #{matterportUrl}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE listings SET latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude} WHERE id = #{id}
